# Copilot instructions for fq-compressor

> **See AGENTS.md for full project rules and architecture.**

## Quick Reference

- **Closeout mode**: Finish, simplify, stabilize - no new features
- **Specs**: repository docs and code are the current source of truth
- **Workflow**: work directly from the requested task and repository docs
- **Build/Test**: `./scripts/build.sh clang-debug` and `./scripts/test.sh clang-debug`
- **Push**: Direct push is default; no PR required

See **AGENTS.md** for complete details.
